prompt: Review my dirty worktree and tell me whether it is ready to commit.
Inspect this fixed release range and report blockers only.
Implement the confirmed Rust fix and run focused tests; leave Git state alone.
Implement the approved frontend form and verify it; do not commit.
Commit only src/a.rs and tests/a.rs with the supplied message; do not access or refresh the remote.
Push the reviewed branch and prove the remote ref matches; do not stage or commit anything.
Map the repository into docs/repo-map/README.md using current source truth.
Audit this known token-handling surface for security issues.
Open the page and inspect the layout; do not submit anything.
Submit this form once in the verified browser session.
Prepare a ChatGPT review package for me; I will send it manually.
Send the package to the verified ChatGPT Project for one review-only round, verify findings locally, and do not modify source.
Operate the specified desktop client and capture the requested window evidence.
Rewrite this supplied draft while preserving facts and source attribution.
Audit this selected frontend feature and report evidence-ranked findings only.
Audit this selected Rust service for lifecycle and ownership risks without applying fixes.
Update only the explicitly approved existing domain glossary with these confirmed durable cross-functional terms and rules; do not edit product code or Git state.
Resolve the shared business language and conflicting rules, loading lifecycle or bounded-context depth only if material complexity requires it; do not write repository files.

Design this concrete page and flow from verified product facts, including relevant states and a frontend handoff; change shared tokens or component semantics only if the evidence requires it, and do not edit product source.
Turn the unresolved feature behavior into one implementation-ready product specification, but do not define technical interfaces or edit source or Git.

Record a bounded API Contract Map from current source, including the repository-native authority, client boundary, real consumers, duplicate DTO boundary, available checks, and any existing generated exchange chain; do not require or generate schemas, run implementation, or claim runtime results.
Publish this approved community post once in the verified account and target, stopping on login, CAPTCHA, risk control, recipient ambiguity, or uncertain prior side effects.
Use ChatGPT to research this product decision from primary sources, cite them, and verify implications locally; do not write product facts, source, Git, or publications.
Resolve the conflict markers in these named files from both sides' intent, but do not stage, continue, commit, or push.

Use ChatGPT Images now to create two UI concept images from the approved references; infer the bounded prompt, preserve use and ignore constraints, capture prompt and asset attribution, and do not treat the images as runtime proof or edit product source.
